chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 958 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08-12-2021 Mr. Muhammad Farooque Rajper, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner’s Counsel submits that as per his instructions, after filing of response by Assistant Commissioner, Thari Mirwah on the last date of hearing, the Petition has served its purpose. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
